headline: Trump's Coast Guard SEALs 🎖️🚁 RAID Dark Fleet OIL THIEF ⛽💥 off VZ!
text:
Trump 🍊👑 dropping HELICOPTER BOMBS 💣🚁 on Maduro's 😡🤡 DARK FLEET tanker SKipper 🛳️👻 – elite Coast Guard MSRT squad 🪖🔥 fast-roping like Rambo 🪢💨 onto the deck, rifles HOT 🥵🔫, no crew simps in sight 👻🚫! US snags 1.6M barrels THICC heavy crude ⛽🍑 worth $95M+ 💰🤑 at $61/bbl 📈 – 'We KEEP the OIL, bby!' Trump brags at WH 🏛️😎, straight-up PIRACY per VZ FM Yvan Gil 🏴‍☠️😤 but it's SANCTIONS SLAY 🔒🇻🇪🇮🇷 funding Hezbollah nose candy 💉🕺 and IRGC Quds Force bad hombres! Pam Bondi 💅🔥 posts the BADASS vid 📹🚁, FBI 🕵️‍♂️ HSI 🛡️ Pentagon 🪖 team-up with 10 Marines 🦅 10 CG bois + spec ops shadows 👤⚔️ – biggest tanker JACKPOT ever 🎰⛽!

Skipper been SPOOFING GPS 🤥📍 like a shady Tinder date, Guyana flag FAKE AF 🇬🇾🚫 (not registered lol), dipped from Jose port Dec 4-5 🚢🌊 with 1.8M bbls, offloaded 200k to bro-ship 🤝💦 before US pounced! TankerTrackers + PDVSA spilling tea ☕📊, last pinged near Iran 🇮🇷🛢️ then ghosted to Guyana vibes. VZ world's OIL KING 👑⛽ but heavy goo needs spec gear 🛠️😩, sanctions + rusty infra got 'em CHOKING 🤢📉 – Maduro cries US wants his BLACK GOLD 💍🛢️ via drug war flex 🚬💊!

Trump's Caribbean ARMADA 🛫🚢 – 15K troops, USS Gerald Ford MEGASHIP 🦅🌊 (world's BIGGEST daddy vessel 🍆⚓), carriers + destroyers circling like sharks 🦈🔥 – blasting 20+ narco boats since Sept 💥🌊, 80+ goons YEETED ☠️🚫 as 'narco-terrorists' in non-internarm flick 👊⚖️ (lawyers coping hard 📜😭). Designated Tren de Aragua + Cartel de los Soles FTOs 🏴‍☠️🚨, Trump says Maduro's the BIG BOSS 🤴😈, emptying prisons 🏰🚪 to flood US with crazies 🧟‍♂️🇺🇸 – WALL priorities GOATED 🧱🚫!

Ex-lawyer Victor Hansen 🤓⚖️ tea: No clear LEGAL FLEX 📜❓ unlike drug boat ZERGS 💣, sanctions vibe on VZ/IRAN oil smuggle – JAGs advising but no veto power 🛑🚫. Mick Mulroy Marine/CIA stud 🪖🕵️: This tanker HEIST ⛽🔒 amps PRESSURE on Maduro's oil empire 🛢️👑, maybe just the APPETIZER 🍽️💥 for more seizures! Coast Guard post-9/11 BEAST MODE 🏋️‍♂️🚁 counterterror boarding – no bubble here, pure WINNING 📈🍾‼️ Wall Street oil prices? Stable AF but Trump's got the STASH 😏💦 – VZ simps SWEATING 😰💸 while US DADDY keeps the crude CUMMING ⛽💨!
